title: Order creation with atomic transaction
description: Order creation with idempotency keys, atomic order+items+payment insert, status workflow

inScope: Atomic transaction: order + items + payment record

acceptanceCriteria.text: Order created with all items in single atomic transaction
Duplicate submission prevented by idempotency key
Order number auto-generated with format ORD-XXXXX
Customer can view order history in account
Admin can view and filter orders
